name: HNMS Prins van Oranje
events: 30 Jul 1940 HrMs Prins van Oranje (Lt.Cdr. A.C. van Versendaal, RNN) departed Tarakan, Netherlands East Indies for Surabaya, Netherlands East Indies. (1)
2 Aug 1940 HrMs Prins van Oranje (Lt.Cdr. A.C. van Versendaal, RNN) arrived at Surabaya, Netherlands East Indies from Tarakan, Netherlands East Indies. (1)
2 Sep 1940 HrMs Prins van Oranje (Lt.Cdr. A.C. van Versendaal, RNN) departed Surabaya, Netherlands East Indies for Tarakan, Netherlands East Indies.

6 Sep 1940 HrMs Prins van Oranje (Lt.Cdr. A.C. van Versendaal, RNN) arrived at Tarakan, Netherlands East Indies from Surabaya, Netherlands East Indies. En-route she had made a short stop at Balikpapan, Netherlands East Indies. (1)
